message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "AppUser" as AppUser
participant "Webserver" as Webserver
participant "OrderController" as OrderController
participant "OrderService" as OrderService
participant "OrderDao" as OrderDao

AppUser -> Webserver : Update https://xxx/orders/{OrderId}?uuid=123
activate Webserver
Webserver --x> OrderController : OrderId
activate OrderController
OrderController --x> OrderService : OrderId
activate OrderService
OrderService --x> OrderDao : OrderId
activate OrderDao
OrderDao --x> OrderService : OrderPO
deactivate OrderDao
OrderService --x> OrderController : OrderVO
deactivate OrderService
OrderController --x> Webserver : OrderVO
deactivate OrderController
Webserver --x> AppUser : 
deactivate Webserver

@enduml
```
